nodes.name: 🔗 Trigger Ranking Engine
nodes.notes: After every shortlist, asynchronously triggers Workflow 3 (Ranking Engine) to re-rank all shortlisted candidates. waitForSubWorkflow=false means this fires and forgets — doesn't block the main pipeline.

values.content:
=You are an expert HR recruiter. Score the following CV for the role of {{ $json.jobRole }}.

CV:
{{ $json.cvText }}

Return a JSON object with:
- overallScore (0-100)
- technicalScore (0-100)
- experienceScore (0-100)
- recommendation (shortlist/review/reject)
- summary (2-3 sentence explanation)

nodes.name: Webhook —     CV Upload
nodes.notes:
ENTRY POINT. Receives CV upload via HTTP POST multipart/form-data.

Expected fields:
- cv_file: PDF or DOCX binary
- applicant_name: string
- applicant_email: string
- job_role: 'AI Engineer' | 'Data Analyst' | 'Backend Developer'

Webhook URL: https://YOUR-N8N/webhook/cv-intake

nodes.name: Validate Input & Extract Metadata
nodes.notes: Validates all required fields. Assigns a unique sessionId for tracking this application through the entire multi-step agent loop. Throws descriptive errors if fields are missing.

nodes.name: Extract CV Text
nodes.notes: Converts PDF or DOCX binary to plain text string. This raw text is what Gemini analyzes.

nodes.name: CV Completeness Analyzer
nodes.notes: AGENT INTELLIGENCE STEP 1: Analyzes CV completeness before sending to Gemini. Checks for presence of email, phone, education, experience, and skills sections. Calculates a completeness score. If score < 70 or 2+ sections missing, flags requiresFollowUp = true. This triggers the multi-step agent loop instead of immediate scoring.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, sessionId: $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.sessionId, message: $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.requiresFollowUp ? 'CV incomplete — follow-up email sent to candidate' : 'CV received and being processed', status: 'processing' }) }}

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Immediately responds to the HTTP caller with a session ID and status. The pipeline continues asynchronously — caller doesn't need to wait.

parameters.subject: Your Application — Additional Information Required
parameters.message:
=

Action Required

Complete Your Application

Additional information needed to proceed

Dear {{ $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.applicantName }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.jobRole }} position. Our AI screening system has reviewed your CV and identified some sections that appear to be missing or incomplete.

Missing Information

{{ $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.missingFields.map(f => '
!
' + f + '
').join('') }}

How to complete your application

Simply reply to this email with an updated CV or provide the missing details directly in your reply. Your application will be automatically re-evaluated within minutes.

We look forward to reviewing your complete application. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reply to this email.

Best regards,
HR Recruitment Team

Processed by AI HR Screening Agent  •  Session: {{ $('CV Completeness Analyzer').item.json.sessionId }}

{{ $now.format("DD MMM YYYY") }}

nodes.name: Email: Request Missing Info
nodes.notes: MULTI-STEP AGENT — STEP 1: Sends a structured email listing exactly which CV sections are missing. Tells candidate to reply with updated info. The reply is caught by Workflow 2 (Follow-Up Listener) which re-triggers the analysis.

nodes.name: Parse OpenAI Response
nodes.notes: Parses Gemini's JSON response. Merges session metadata. Falls back to form-provided name/email if Gemini couldn't extract them from the CV text. Validates all required sections exist.

nodes.name: Decision Router
nodes.notes: Routes SHORTLIST to email+calendar+sheets. Non-shortlist goes to second router.

nodes.name: Review vs Reject
nodes.notes: Splits REVIEW (log only) from REJECT (email + log).
